name: roundtrip_mixed_adversarial
description: Round-trip invariant (SPEC 16.4 / 1.1) on a mixed value that stresses the encoder: a null (encoded -), a nested object section, a top-level scalar requiring quoting for an embedded pipe and escaped quote, and a primitive array with a comma/pipe element requiring quoting. Pins decode(encode(v)) == v with exact bytes.
